title: The Brigand's Tongue
target: wring the location of the bandit cache out of the prisoner before dawn

contributions.line: Marek's brawny fist presses into the prisoner's collar, forcing him to meet the hard stare of a soldier who fought at Greyford.
Veska's sharp eyes catch the flicker of inconsistency, her voice calm but pointed as she questions the prisoner.

outcomeNarrative: Marek's intimidation cracks the prisoner's false calm, while Veska's keen eye spots the shifting story, bringing the truth closer.
